title: Past events
content: Past events Detailed Report on the Training of Master Trainers for Hazard-Resistant Safe Construction Practices: January 22–24, 2025 Report on the Training of Master Trainers for Hazard Resistant Safe Construction Practices Phase 2: November 6–8, 2024 Report on the Training of Master Trainers for Hazard Resistant Safe Construction Practices: Phase 1: October 14–16, 2024 An International Conference on Civil, Materials and Environment for Sustainability (ICCMES 2024): Conference Date 4th & 5th October 2024 Report-Training Program on School Safety and Disaster Management : September 24–27, 2024 One Week Online Workshop on Disaster Risk Assessment: July 22–26, 2024. One Week Online Workshop on "Disaster Risk Assessment": July 22–26, 2024 One week workshop on “Innovative Solutions for Sustainable Constructions in Civil Engineering” 04th-9th October 2021. First International conference on Construction Materials and Environment (ICCME2021), 03rd-04th June 2021, with publication in Springer. One-week online workshop on “Sustainable construction practices in Civil Engineering” 03rd -08th August 2020. Faculty Development program on “Current aspects and research opportunities in civil engineering” 20th-24th July 2020. Three days training program on “Training for masons on hazard resistant construction”, 25th-27th February 2020. Phase IV of six-day workshop on “Mix design methodology for concrete and bitumen”, 22nd-28th September 2019. Phase III of six-day workshop on “Mix design methodology for concrete and bitumen”, 02nd-09th September 2019. Phase II of six-day workshop on “Mix design methodology for concrete and bitumen”, 24th-29th June 2019. Phase I of six-day workshop on “Mix design methodology for concrete and bitumen”, 10th-15th June 2019. One Week FDP program “Advances in Civil Engineering” 14th-19th January 2019. Two days symposium on “Recent Trends in Civil Engineering Towards Sustainable Environment”, 16-17 October 2018.
